overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a tan duster coat walking through a muddy rural town toward Valentine Station during a light rain shower. The character passes horses and wooden carriages before entering the train station building.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy approach to rural train station with hitching posts

events.description: light rain begins to fall, becoming visible as streaks in the air

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy path toward the station building, navigating around the hitching post area

notable_agents.action: group of horses tied to hitching post, standing stationary with occasional head movement
wooden horse-drawn carriage parked near the station entrance

entered.detail: large wooden train station with gabled roof and covered porch
snow-capped rocky mountain visible in the background
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars
wooden rail with multiple horses tied

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy dirt path toward Valentine Station during a light rain shower. The wooden station building dominates the center view with mountains in the background. Horses are tied to a hitching post on the right near a parked wooden carriage.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk ramp leading to station entrance

events.description: steps from muddy ground onto wooden boardwalk ramp
slows approach while moving toward the station entrance door

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden ramp and along the covered boardwalk toward the station entrance

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway with railings leading to the entrance
large dark wooden double doors with glass transom above
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the building wall
piles of burlap sandbags stacked near the building foundation

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the muddy ground to a wooden boardwalk ramp leading up to the station entrance. The rain continues but the character is now partially sheltered under the building's overhang. Sandbags and wooden barrels line the sides of the walkway as the character approaches the entrance doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: train station ticket office and waiting area

events.description: enters the train station building, transitioning from outdoor rain to dry interior

agents.ego_description: entering the station lobby and walking toward the ticket counter while observing the interior

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden bench against the wall, reading a newspaper

entered.detail: large wooden ticket booth with glass windows and brass trim, displaying train schedules
wooden bench with metal legs positioned against the wall
ornate patterned carpet covering the floor in geometric designs
brass wall-mounted lamp with glass shade providing warm interior light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Valentine Station interior, leaving the rain behind. The space features a large wooden ticket counter in the center, patterned carpet flooring, and a waiting area with benches. Warm light from wall sconces and windows illuminates the room where a man sits reading on a bench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked muddy street into the warm, sheltered interior of a rural train station. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path toward the wooden station building, passing horses and a carriage under a light rain shower with mountains looming in the distance. As the character advances, the terrain shifts from mud to a wooden boardwalk ramp, moving under the building's overhang where sandbags and barrels line the path toward the entrance. The scene then transitions inside the station, leaving the rain behind to reveal a room with patterned carpets and a large wooden ticket counter. Finally, the lighting shifts from the gray exterior to a warm glow from wall sconces, illuminating a waiting area where a man sits reading on a bench.
